2605.07850.title: MatryoshkaLoRA: Learning Accurate Hierarchical Low-Rank Representations for LLM Fine-Tuning
2605.07850.paper_summary: With the rise in scale for deep learning models to billions of parameters, the computational cost of fine-tuning remains a significant barrier to deployment. While Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become the standard for parameter-efficient fine-tuning, the need to set a predefined, static rank $r$ requires exhaustive grid searches to balance efficiency and performance. Existing rank-adaptive solutions such as DyLoRA mitigate this by sampling ranks during the training from a predefined distribution. However, they often yield sub-optimal results at higher ranks due to lack of consistent gradient signals across the full hierarchy of ranks, thus making these methods data-inefficient. In this paper, we propose MatryoshkaLoRA, a general, Matryoshka-inspired training framework for LoRA that learns accurate hierarchical low-rank representations by inserting a fixed, carefully crafted diagonal matrix $P$ between the existing LoRA adapters to scale their sub-ranks accordingly. By introducing this simple modification, our general framework recovers LoRA and DyLoRA only by changing $P$ and ensures all sub-ranks embed the available gradient information efficiently. Our MatryoshkaLoRA supports dynamic rank selection with minimal degradation in accuracy. We further propose Area Under the Rank Accuracy Curve (AURAC), a metric that consistently evaluates the performance of hierarchical low-rank adapters. Our results demonstrate that MatryoshkaLoRA learns more accurate hierarchical low-rank representations than prior rank-adaptive approaches and achieves superior accuracy-performance trade-offs across ranks on the evaluated datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/IST-DASLab/MatryoshkaLoRA.
2605.07850.paper_summary_zh: 隨著深度學習模型的規模上升至數十億個參數，微調的計算成本仍然是部署的一個重要障礙。雖然低秩適應（LoRA）已成為參數高效微調的標準，但需要設置預定的靜態秩 $r$，這要求進行耗時的網格搜索以平衡效率和性能。現有的秩自適應解決方案，如DyLoRA，通過從預定分佈中在訓練過程中抽樣秩來減輕這個問題。然而，由於缺乏在完整的秩層次結構中一致的梯度信號，它們在較高的秩上往往會產生次優的結果，因此使這些方法在數據上效率低下。在本文中，我們提出了MatryoshkaLoRA，一個通用的、受馬特里奧什卡啟發的LoRA訓練框架，通過在現有的LoRA適配器之間插入一個固定的、精心設計的對角矩陣 $P$，來學習準確的層次低秩表示，以相應地擴展它們的子秩。通過引入這一簡單的修改，我們的通用框架僅通過改變 $P$ 來恢復LoRA和DyLoRA，並確保所有子秩有效地嵌入可用的梯度信息。我們的MatryoshkaLoRA支持動態秩選擇，並在準確性上僅有最小的降級。我們進一步提出了秩準確性曲線下的面積（AURAC），這是一個持續評估層次低秩適配器性能的指標。我們的結果表明，MatryoshkaLoRA學習到的層次低秩表示比先前的秩自適應方法更準確，並在評估數據集上實現了各秩之間的卓越準確性與性能權衡。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/IST-DASLab/MatryoshkaLoRA 獲得。
2605.07850.author: Ionut-Vlad Modoranu et.al.
2605.07850.authors: Ionut-Vlad Modoranu, Mher Safaryan, Dan Alistarh
